## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to review content strategy and discuss blog post ideas for Tavrn's legal tech content marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New blog post tone approved: professional, authoritative, Investopedia-like](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Content focus: educational/news for lawyers, avoid sales-adjacent topics](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [AI-related content should emphasize competitive advantage, not job threat](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Goal: Produce 5 blog posts/week, with Jon and Pedro reviewing](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)

## Topics

### Content Tone and Style

  - [Redone blog post received positive feedback](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Professional, neutral, educational tone achieved](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Minor tweak needed: reduce passive voice usage](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Jon appreciated the readability and lawyer-appropriate style](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Shift away from sales-oriented topics (e.g., "3 reasons for document automation")](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Focus on educational, news-like content relevant to lawyers](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Emphasis on case studies, legal precedents, and industry news](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [AI topics should address market education and realistic expectations](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=779.0)

### AI Content Approach

  - [Frame AI as a competitive advantage for lawyers and law firms](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Draw parallels with historical tech adoptions (e.g., Excel, ATMs)](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
  - [Address misconceptions about AI replacing jobs](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Highlight AI as a tool to enhance efficiency and competitiveness](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)

### Blog Post Ideas

  - [Approved topics: Cambridge eligibility case, Starbucks drive-through lawsuit](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Interest in data-driven content (e.g., settlement trends, jury decisions)](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [Enthusiasm for AI adoption strategies in law firms](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Suggestion to create programmatic, data-visualized content (e.g., state-by-state legal maps)](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Jon and Pedro to review new blog posts together](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
  - [Weekly 1-hour meeting proposed for content feedback](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Feedback to focus on coverage direction and potential additions](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create and deliver 3 new blog posts for review this week](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [Aim for 5 blog posts per week moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [Schedule weekly content review meeting with Jon and Pedro](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Follow up on pending Google Search Console and GA4 access](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Share updated blog post with Jon, Pedro, and Victor for final review](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Publish approved blog post on Tavrn's Webflow site](https://fathom.video/share/nsFCAQViwaWxKuZ-Tj3jMYtbTbyDuMRf?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)
